qa_pairs.question: What are the steps to install CASTEP version 20.11 on a cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To install CASTEP version 20.11 on a cluster, first, you must obtain the `CASTEP-20.11.tar.gz` archive file from `http://www.castep.org/get_castep`. Next, upload this file to your `/home/$USER` folder on the intended cluster. Then, execute the command `eb CASTEP-20.11-iofbf-2020a.eb --sourcepath=$HOME --disable-enforce-checksums` on the cluster. Once this command has completed, you should log out from the cluster and log back in.

qa_pairs.question: After CASTEP is installed, how do users load its module and run a CASTEP MPI application on a compute node?
qa_pairs.answer: To load the CASTEP module, use the command `module load castep`. To run the CASTEP executable as an MPI application on a compute node, you would use `srun castep.mpi seedname`, where `seedname` refers to your input files such as `seedname.cell` and `seedname.param`.
